properties.description: Triggers a child pipeline with parameters to perform downstream processing

activities.name: Sp_update_WatermarkTbs
activities.description: Executes a stored procedure to update the watermark value in the control table using the provided table schema, table name, and watermark column

activities.name: LKUP_MAX_VALUE
activities.description: Retrieves the maximum value of the watermark column from the source table to identify the latest available data

activities.name: If_NEW_record_Exists
activities.description: Checks whether new data exists by comparing the latest watermark value with the last loaded value, triggering the load if conditions are met.

ifTrueActivities.name: CopySQL_FULL_INCREMENTAL_LOAD_TABLES
ifTrueActivities.description: Source:Copies data from the source table to the target in Parquet format, performing a full load if no previous watermark exists or an incremental load by filtering records greater than the last loaded value.

ifTrueActivities.name: Exec_Update_WATERMARKTABLE
ifTrueActivities.description: Triggers a child pipeline with parameters to perform downstream processing

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT TableSchema, TableName, WatermarkColumn, LastLoadValue FROM dbo.ADF_Watermark_Table;

properties.description: This query extracts metadata, including schema, table name, watermark column, and last processed value, from the ADF watermark table.
Send text and csv file in seperate folder
